name: solana_token_safety_check
description: Preview safety analysis for any Solana SPL token. Returns risk score (0-100), risk level, and summary. Full report with authority addresses, holder breakdown, LP lock status, honeypot details, and change detection requires x402 payment ($0.008 USDC) via the REST API at GET /v1/check?mint=<address>.

mint_address.description: Solana token mint address in base58 format

name: solana_token_safety_lite
description: Quick free safety check for any Solana SPL token. Returns risk score (0-100), risk level, and a human-readable summary. Same analysis engine as the full check but without detailed per-check breakdowns. Free, rate-limited to 10 requests/minute per IP. Use for fast screening before deciding whether to pay for a full report.

mint_address.description: Solana token mint address in base58 format
